heading: As a Finishing Ingredient
content:
| Use Case         | Suggested Amount                    |
| ---------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| Hot rice         | 1–2 teaspoons per serving           |
| Khichuri         | 1–2 teaspoons per serving           |
| Polao or biryani | 1–2 tablespoons per pot or to taste |
| Dal (lentils)    | 1 teaspoon per bowl                 |
| Bread or paratha | ½–1 teaspoon per piece              |

heading: For Cooking
content:
| Preparation         | Suggested Amount                            |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| Vegetable sauté     | 1–2 tablespoons                             |
| Tempering spices    | 1 tablespoon                                |
| Dessert preparation | As required by recipe                       |
| Baking              | Substitute according to recipe requirements |

</section>
